tools.name: openAi.cancelFineTune
tools.description: Immediately cancel a fine-tune job.

tools.name: openAi.createAnswer
tools.description:
Answers the specified question using the provided documents and examples.

The endpoint first [searches](/docs/api-reference/searches) over provided documents or files to find relevant context. The relevant context is combined with the provided examples and question to create the prompt for [completion](/docs/api-reference/completions).

tools.name: openAi.createChatCompletion
tools.description: Creates a completion for the chat message

tools.name: openAi.createClassification
tools.description:
Classifies the specified `query` using provided examples.

The endpoint first [searches](/docs/api-reference/searches) over the labeled examples
to select the ones most relevant for the particular query. Then, the relevant examples
are combined with the query to construct a prompt to produce the final label via the
[completions](/docs/api-reference/completions) endpoint.

Labeled examples can be provided via an uploaded `file`, or explicitly listed in the
request using the `examples` parameter for quick tests and small scale use cases.

tools.name: openAi.createCompletion
tools.description: Creates a completion for the provided prompt and parameters

tools.name: openAi.createEdit
tools.description: Creates a new edit for the provided input, instruction, and parameters.

tools.name: openAi.createEmbedding
tools.description: Creates an embedding vector representing the input text.

tools.name: openAi.createFile
tools.description: Upload a file that contains document(s) to be used across various endpoints/features. Currently, the size of all the files uploaded by one organization can be up to 1 GB. Please contact us if you need to increase the storage limit.

tools.name: openAi.createFineTune
tools.description:
Creates a job that fine-tunes a specified model from a given dataset.

Response includes details of the enqueued job including job status and the name of the fine-tuned models once complete.

[Learn more about Fine-tuning](/docs/guides/fine-tuning)

tools.name: openAi.createImage
tools.description: Creates an image given a prompt.

tools.name: openAi.createImageEdit
tools.description: Creates an edited or extended image given an original image and a prompt.

tools.name: openAi.createImageVariation
tools.description: Creates a variation of a given image.

tools.name: openAi.createModeration
tools.description: Classifies if text violates OpenAI's Content Policy

tools.name: openAi.createSearch
tools.description:
The search endpoint computes similarity scores between provided query and documents. Documents can be passed directly to the API if there are no more than 200 of them.

To go beyond the 200 document limit, documents can be processed offline and then used for efficient retrieval at query time. When `file` is set, the search endpoint searches over all the documents in the given file and returns up to the `max_rerank` number of documents. These documents will be returned along with their search scores.

The similarity score is a positive score that usually ranges from 0 to 300 (but can sometimes go higher), where a score above 200 usually means the document is semantically similar to the query.

tools.name: openAi.createTranscription
tools.description: Transcribes audio into the input language.

tools.name: openAi.createTranslation
tools.description: Translates audio into into English.

tools.name: openAi.deleteFile
tools.description: Delete a file.

tools.name: openAi.deleteModel
tools.description: Delete a fine-tuned model. You must have the Owner role in your organization.

tools.name: openAi.downloadFile
tools.description: Returns the contents of the specified file

tools.name: openAi.listEngines
tools.description: Lists the currently available (non-finetuned) models, and provides basic information about each one such as the owner and availability.

tools.name: openAi.listFiles
tools.description: Returns a list of files that belong to the user's organization.

tools.name: openAi.listFineTuneEvents
tools.description: Get fine-grained status updates for a fine-tune job.

tools.name: openAi.listFineTunes
tools.description: List your organization's fine-tuning jobs

tools.name: openAi.listModels
tools.description: Lists the currently available models, and provides basic information about each one such as the owner and availability.

tools.name: openAi.retrieveEngine
tools.description: Retrieves a model instance, providing basic information about it such as the owner and availability.

tools.name: openAi.retrieveFile
tools.description: Returns information about a specific file.

tools.name: openAi.retrieveFineTune
tools.description:
Gets info about the fine-tune job.

[Learn more about Fine-tuning](/docs/guides/fine-tuning)

tools.name: openAi.retrieveModel
tools.description: Retrieves a model instance, providing basic information about the model such as the owner and permissioning.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
